extraction.one_line_summary: MALAMA Bauke soloed 45km to victory after attacking on the category two climb, surprising given limited breakaway opportunities all day.
tactical_patterns: Peloton refused to let early 5-rider break establish advantage beyond 40 seconds for over an hour, signaling GC nervousness.
MALAMA attacked 45km from finish on cat-2 climb while others hesitated despite commentary noting few breakaway opportunities remaining.
MARTIN Guillaume climbed from 9th to 2nd GC (4 seconds back) exploiting stage chaos, UAE depth controlled without burning matches.

rider_signals.MALAMA Bauke: positive: sustained 45km solo after cat-2 attack shows exceptional confidence management on climbing stages despite being Dutch climber
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: positive: opportunistic GC jump from 9th to 2nd (4 seconds) suggests he's positioning for podium exploitation if Pogacar weakens
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: UAE retained full team depth on hard stage while maintaining 4:04 lead, revealing conservative pacing strategy before Pyrenees
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: took KOM jersey despite earlier crash, but commentary flags descent weakness as tactical liability for mountain stages
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: lost KOM jersey after 5 days, consistently dropping on climbs reveals diminished ability to defend positions
